title: elemifera lineata
intro: Elemifera lineata, also known as the Lineated Elm or Elm-leaved Prickly Ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, derived from its bark and leaves. The health benefits of Elemifera lineata include relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Elemifera lineata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
